# All Colours Painting Contractor Limited

> Family-run painters & decorators in Dublin, Ireland. Interior, exterior, commercial, industrial and heritage painting — over 20 years, fully insured, written workmanship guarantee.

All Colours Painting is a family-run painting and decorating contractor based in Dublin. We deliver high-quality finishes for residential, commercial, industrial and heritage clients across Dublin and surrounding areas. Every quote includes a free site visit, every job is backed by a 2-year written workmanship guarantee, and the person who quotes the job is on site for it.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, services, recent case studies, process and testimonials.
- [About](/about): Company story, 20+ year timeline, values and approach.
- [Services](/services): Residential, commercial, industrial, heritage painting, wallpapering, spray finishing, plastering, floor coatings, materials and process.
- [Case Studies](/case-studies): Detailed project breakdowns — brief, prep, materials and results.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Recent project photography.
- [Blog](/blog): Practical advice on finishes, prep, colour and painting in Irish weather.
- [FAQ](/faq): Honest answers on booking, pricing, process, materials and aftercare.
- [Contact](/contact): Request a free site visit and written quote.
